problems.diagnostic: Communication_Properties (identifier) qualified reference name not found in 'with' statements of Integer_Toy (package specification)
problems.cause: Qualified reference to Communication_Properties::Timing in connection properties is not resolved due to missing 'with' clause
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the qualified reference to Communication_Properties::Timing from all connection property specifications

executor_steps: Remove the {Communication_Properties::Timing => immediate;} property specifications from all connections in the top_level.Impl component
Ensure that the 'with Communication_Properties;' clause is present in the package specification if Communication_Properties is used elsewhere
